message:
fix(tests): resolve eslint errors and warnings across test suite

- franken-terminal-widget.spec.ts: fix @typescript-eslint/no-this-alias
  error by renaming `self` to `observer` with an eslint-disable comment,
  since the alias is genuinely needed to pass the mock IntersectionObserver
  instance as the second argument to the observer callback

- sync-showcase.test.ts: remove unused `stderr` destructured variable
  from happy-path test (line 130); prefix `mtimeBefore` with underscore
  in delta-sync test (line 264) — the stat call is kept as it validates
  the file exists, but the mtime value is not yet asserted

- update-web-demo.test.ts: remove unused `stdout` from destructuring
  in the "errors when frankentui path is invalid" test (line 197)

- web-demo.spec.ts: prefix unused `captureFailure` helper with underscore
  — the function is defined for future failure-screenshot capture but not
  yet wired into any test assertions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
